meta.title: RBI DLG Disclosure
meta.description: Regulatory disclosure about NavDhan, lenders, and loan products.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

intro.heading: RBI DLG Disclosure
intro.body: This page provides the regulatory disclosures required under Reserve Bank of India guidelines for digital lending, including our role, lender relationships, and product terms.

sections.title: Regulatory disclosure statement
sections.body: NavDhan is an intermediary technology platform operated by Kubar Protocol Private Limited. We are not a bank, NBFC, or financial institution. All credit decisions, sanctions, and disbursements are made solely by our RBI-registered lending partners.

sections.title: Role of NavDhan
sections.body: We provide technology infrastructure for borrower onboarding, document collection, lender matching, and status tracking. We do not set interest rates, fees, or credit policy. We do not guarantee loan approval.

table.caption: Representative lending partners
rows: Originate loans directly or through co-lending

table.caption: Illustrative loan terms
rows: Final amount depends on lender policy and profile.
Rates quoted are annualised and may vary by lender.
Disclosed in the Key Facts Statement.

sections.title: Consent and data use
sections.body: We collect and share data only with your explicit, informed consent. You will be shown clear consent screens at each stage of the application. You may withdraw consent for optional processing at any time.

sections.title: Grievance redressal
sections.body: For complaints about platform service, contact our support team. For complaints about a specific lender, please also contact the lender directly.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156 Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

sections.title: Detailed grievance process
sections.body: For step-by-step complaint handling and escalation timelines, please refer to our Grievance Redressal page.
